motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution: 
```python
class ExamRoom:

    def __init__(self, n: int):
        self.n = n
        self.seats = []
        self.max_distance = 0

    def seat(self) -> int:
        if not self.seats:
            self.seats.append(0)
            return 0
        max_distance = self.max_distance
        prev = self.seats[0]
        for i in range(len(self.seats) - 1):
            distance = (self.seats[i + 1] - prev) // 2
            if distance > max_distance:
                max_distance = distance
                seat = (prev + self.seats[i + 1]) // 2
        if self.n - 1 - self.seats[-1] > max_distance:
            seat = self.n - 1
        else:
            seat = self.seats[-1] + max_distance
        self.seats.append(seat)
        self.seats.sort()
        self.max_distance = 0
        for i in range(len(self.seats) - 1):
            distance = (self.seats[i + 1] - self.seats[i]) // 2
            if distance > self.max_distance:
                self.max_distance = distance
        return seat

    def leave(self, p: int) -> None:
        self.seats.remove(p)
        self.seats.sort()
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n log n) for seat operation, O(n) for leave operation
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
